final:
module rnn_cell (
    input [3:0] x,      // 4-bit input
    input [3:0] h_prev, // 4-bit previous hidden state
    output reg [3:0] h_out // 4-bit output (new hidden state)
);
    always @(x, h_prev) begin
        h_out = (x + h_prev) % 16; // Simple addition and modulo operation
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      h_out <= h_prev - x;
    end
  end

endmodule
